message:
web: Redesign log detail page header and metadata

- Add serif font with wide tracking for title
- Move diff stats next to title with baseline alignment
- Reorder metadata: author, time, visibility, model, git
- Combine repo and branch display (repo:branch format)
- Remove cost approximation
- Add document.title with page summary
- Make visibility dropdown borderless inline style
- Add Clock icon for time display

🔮 View transcript: https://agentlogs.ai/s/jg4re8nj77
